text:
There once was a little rabbit named Fawn. Her favorite thing to do was hop around in the dewy meadows listening to the songs of sweet birds. On her seventeenth birthday, she discovered the magical Golden Orb Worm.

Every night, just before dusk, she'd hear a soft melody coming from it. Intrigued, Fawn began to listen. The melody told her stories of faraway lands and wise old owls. One night, as the moon hung low, she heard a message: she was destined to save her forest from an evil sorcerer.

With dreams of heroic journeys fueling her, Fawn embarked on a quest. Every day she practiced flying on her tiny wings. Finally, after a year filled with owl wisdom and many daring flights, she found the sorcerer's tower.

It was an imposing castle made of ice. Fawn sneaked past sleeping guardians and magical defenses. On the sixth night, she reached the sorcerer's chamber. Sitting on a throne
